name_cn:
Earth Yellow·
LE 5À7 Series New Bucket Bag with Handle_New shape, made of Italian calfskin. The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. It has metal studs at the bottom and a classic metal logo insert buckle. The overall look gives a unique blend of classic elegance and modern chic!
Model: 742828
Size: 26×20×12cm
